stemHtml: May a flight still be conducted, if during the pre-flight check, one of the flight instruments in an aircraft is found to be inoperative?

options.a: Yes, if the Commander accepts the risk of conducting the flight without the instrument in question.
options.b: Yes, if there is a back-up instrument available in the flight crew compartment.
options.c: No, conducting a flight with an inoperative flight instrument is NOT allowed.
options.d: Yes, if the MEL allows for the instrument in question to be inoperative.
